sourcesContent:
export const themes = {
  rose: {
    name: '????',
    bg: 'bg-gradient-to-br from-rose-50 via-pink-50 to-amber-50',
    sidebar: 'bg-white/70 backdrop-blur-xl border-r border-rose-100/60 shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(244,114,182,0.1)]',
    avatarRing: 'ring-2 ring-rose-300/70 ring-offset-2',
    btn: 'bg-white/80 hover:bg-rose-50/80 text-rose-900 border border-rose-200/60 rounded-2xl transition-all duration-300 hover:-translate-y-0.5 hover:shadow-md',
    btnActive: 'bg-rose-100/80 shadow-[0_2px_12px_rgba(244,114,182,0.2)]',
    sectionTitle: 'text-rose-400',
    textMuted: 'text-rose-400/70',
    userBubble: 'bg-gradient-to-br from-rose-300 via-pink-200 to-amber-200 text-white shadow-[0_4px_12px_rgba(244,114,182,0.3)]',
    aiBubble: 'bg-white/85 backdrop-blur-sm border border-pink-200 text-gray-700 shadow-[0_4px_12px_rgba(0,0,0,0.04)]',
    input: 'border-pink-200 focus:ring-rose-300/50',
    sendBtn: 'bg-gradient-to-r from-rose-300 to-pink-300 hover:from-rose-400 hover:to-pink-400 text-white shadow-[0_4px_12px_rgba(244,114,182,0.3)]',
    themeDot: 'bg-gradient-to-br from-rose-300 to-pink-300',
  },
  aqua: {
    name: '????',
    bg: 'bg-gradient-to-br from-sky-50 via-blue-50 to-emerald-50',
    sidebar: 'bg-white/70 backdrop-blur-xl border-r border-sky-100/60 shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(56,189,248,0.1)]',
    avatarRing: 'ring-2 ring-sky-300/70 ring-offset-2',
    btn: 'bg-white/80 hover:bg-sky-50/80 text-sky-900 border border-sky-200/60 rounded-2xl transition-all duration-300 hover:-translate-y-0.5 hover:shadow-md',
    btnActive: 'bg-sky-100/80 shadow-[0_2px_12px_rgba(56,189,248,0.2)]',
    sectionTitle: 'text-sky-400',
    textMuted: 'text-sky-400/70',
    userBubble: 'bg-gradient-to-br from-sky-300 via-blue-200 to-emerald-200 text-white shadow-[0_4px_12px_rgba(56,189,248,0.3)]',
    aiBubble: 'bg-white/85 backdrop-blur-sm border border-blue-200 text-gray-700 shadow-[0_4px_12px_rgba(0,0,0,0.04)]',
    input: 'border-blue-200 focus:ring-sky-300/50',
    sendBtn: 'bg-gradient-to-r from-sky-300 to-blue-300 hover:from-sky-400 hover:to-blue-400 text-white shadow-[0_4px_12px_rgba(56,189,248,0.3)]',
    themeDot: 'bg-gradient-to-br from-sky-300 to-blue-300',
  },
  warm: {
    name: '????',
    bg: 'bg-gradient-to-br from-amber-50 via-orange-50 to-stone-100',
    sidebar: 'bg-white/70 backdrop-blur-xl border-r border-amber-100/60 shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(245,158,11,0.1)]',
    avatarRing: 'ring-2 ring-amber-300/70 ring-offset-2',
    btn: 'bg-white/80 hover:bg-amber-50/80 text-amber-900 border border-amber-200/60 rounded-2xl transition-all duration-300 hover:-translate-y-0.5 hover:shadow-md',
    btnActive: 'bg-amber-100/80 shadow-[0_2px_12px_rgba(245,158,11,0.2)]',
    sectionTitle: 'text-amber-400',
    textMuted: 'text-amber-400/70',
    userBubble: 'bg-gradient-to-br from-amber-300 via-orange-200 to-yellow-200 text-white shadow-[0_4px_12px_rgba(245,158,11,0.3)]',
    aiBubble: 'bg-white/85 backdrop-blur-sm border border-amber-200 text-gray-700 shadow-[0_4px_12px_rgba(0,0,0,0.04)]',
    input: 'border-amber-200 focus:ring-amber-300/50',
    sendBtn: 'bg-gradient-to-r from-amber-300 to-orange-300 hover:from-amber-400 hover:to-orange-400 text-white shadow-[0_4px_12px_rgba(245,158,11,0.3)]',
    themeDot: 'bg-gradient-to-br from-amber-300 to-orange-300',
  },
};
